category_title: Adolescents with ADHD exhibiting low agency and performance deficits
minimal_context: The student and tutor are reviewing a four-page writing assignment that requires research and is due in two days.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the four-page writing assignment you have due in two days. Do you have the sheet?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Yeah, I have it. I started thinking about it pretty much right away when we got the sheet, but I haven't actually started the work.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You should start working on it now so you have time to research the topic well.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I know, I'm just lazy. Like, I just … like, I’ll sit home … I’ve got, like, a four-page thing due in two days and I say I’m going to get it done, then next thing I know, it’s 12:00 the day before and I don’t have it done yet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Well, just try to sit down and do it fast tonight so it's finished.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't, I'm too daunted by the scope of it. I always think I can do it fast, but then I run out of steam. Then I start freaking out because it’s 4 a.m., and it’s due the next day, and I have no idea what I wrote … ’cause it’s so late … so I burst out into tears.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the four-page writing assignment you have due in two days. Do you have the sheet?

STUDENT: Yeah, I have it. I started thinking about it pretty much right away when we got the sheet, but I haven't actually started the work.

TUTOR: You should start working on it now so you have time to research the topic well.

STUDENT: I know, I'm just lazy. Like, I just … like, I’ll sit home … I’ve got, like, a four-page thing due in two days and I say I’m going to get it done, then next thing I know, it’s 12:00 the day before and I don’t have it done yet.

TUTOR: Well, just try to sit down and do it fast tonight so it's finished.

STUDENT: I can't, I'm too daunted by the scope of it. I always think I can do it fast, but then I run out of steam. Then I start freaking out because it’s 4 a.m., and it’s due the next day, and I have no idea what I wrote … ’cause it’s so late … so I burst out into tears.

task.content: a four-page thing due in two days

context.time_context: 12:00 the day before and 4 a.m., and it's due the next day

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: being daunted by the scope of a project
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: sit home … I’ve got, like, a four-page thing due in two days and I say I’m going to get it done, then next thing I know, it’s 12:00 the day before and I don’t have it done yet
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: freaking out because it’s 4 a.m., and it’s due the next day, and I have no idea what I wrote
related_quotes: I started freaking out because it’s 4 a.m., and it’s due the next day, and I have no idea what I wrote … ’cause it’s so late … so I burst out into tears and I ran downstairs and I was, like, crying to my mom.

behavior_patterns.condition: completing the majority of a project
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: running out of steam and believing they could 'do it fast'
related_quotes: All of these students used the word lazy or laziness to explain why they did not succeed in completing their schoolwork.
